# Settle — AI, thoughtfully deployed.

> Settle is an AI deployment studio that settles AI into businesses, taking them from 0 to 1. We deploy structured rollouts, production-grade instructions, and measurable results.

## Services

- AI Readiness Assessment: Department-by-department workflow audit, use case discovery, tier-based rollout planning
- Deployment Dashboard: Interactive rollout visualisation, project-level tracking, skill mapping, kanban execution
- Instruction Engineering: Production-grade Claude instructions, knowledge file specifications, review gates, safety rules
- Setup & Training: Project creation, knowledge file preparation, team training, ongoing iteration

## Process

1. Discovery — Map every repeatable workflow. Identify what eats time, what's error-prone, what's high-volume.
2. Architecture — Use cases, departments, timelines, gaps, and skills in one interactive dashboard.
3. Instruction Engineering — Production-grade project instructions with review gates, rules, and knowledge files.
4. Deploy & Settle — Deploy, train, iterate. Quick wins in weeks, deeper integrations in phases.

## Results

- 85% faster document generation
- 49 use cases mapped per company
- 11 projects deployed per engagement
- Task time reduction from 4 hours to 30 minutes

## Contact

Website: https://settlewithai.com
